chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 630 of 2016 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For orders on CMA No.3804/2016. 15.12.2025 Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2016 without any progress. On 18.02.2022, following order was passed: “18.02.2022 Mrs. Masooda Siraj, Advocate for the applicant. 1. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&3. Learned counsel for the applicant seeks time to file fresh questions of law arising out the order of the Tribunal.” Today counsel states that the aforesaid order has not been complied with and no justification has been articulated. In view hereof, it appears that the applicant department is not interested in present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
